response.overview: n the fourth installment of the "Futanarism" series, director Hitoshi Nimura focuses on the contrast between high-volume pleasure and stunning physical attributes. Featuring a cast where five of the six performers boast large cup sizes and all six possess massive hidden members (ranging from 18cm to 23cm), the film pushes the boundaries of the fantasy genre. The feature culminates in a chaotic group encounter between Koyoi Yumesaki, Maho Sawai, and Kasumi, resulting in a total of 25 explosive climaxes that flow like a broken faucet.
response.tagline: 6 girls, 6 massive members, and 25 rounds of broken-faucet pleasure.
